name: trafico-live-google-action
description: Google Assistant Action Cloud Function handler for trafico.live

scripts.deploy: npm run build && gcloud functions deploy traficoLiveWebhook --runtime nodejs20 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --region europe-west1 --set-env-vars TRAFICO_API_KEY=$TRAFICO_API_KEY,TRAFICO_API_BASE=https://trafico.live/api --source dist
